name: Can I sue my boss if I slipped and fell at work in Boise Idaho?
description: No, use workers' comp instead—it's no-fault coverage for work injuries.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my boss if I slipped and fell at work in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, use workers' comp instead—it's no-fault coverage for work injuries.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, you generally cannot sue your employer for a slip and fall at work; workers' compensation is your exclusive remedy in Idaho and Utah.** These systems provide no-fault benefits for work injuries, protecting employers from lawsuits.[1] Key factors: (1) Covers medical bills and lost wages; (2) No need to prove fault; (3) Benefits limited to specific categories. If a third party caused the hazard, you might sue them separately. Contact a local workers' comp lawyer to file your claim and maximize benefits.
